notes: Excellent stakeholder analysis with comprehensive coverage of all major groups (government, industry, advisory members, public). Clear identification of nuanced positions on sharing vs. relocation, supported by transcript evidence. Well-mapped tensions and agreements with specific examples. Minor inefficiencies: (1) created two identical output files (stakeholder_analysis.md and stakeholder_analysis_1.md), (2) some positions stated as direct fact when they are reasonable inferences rather than explicit quotes, (3) a few interpretive characterizations (e.g., '$18B is too high') could be more precisely attributed. Unresolved questions section is thorough and valuable. Summary assessment frames the core dynamics effectively. Overall exceeds expectations for the task.
